_meta.description: TradingSquad AI skill manifest for installer and agent auto-discovery

entries.name: Institutional Analyst
entries.description: Institutional-grade bandarmology, Wyckoff structure, tape reading, broker flow, and order book intelligence for IDX equities.

entries.name: Technical Analyst
entries.description: Context-aware technical analysis (VWAP, RSI, MACD, Bollinger, MA, Fibonacci, SMC) across intraday through long-term modes.

entries.name: Fundamental Analyst
entries.description: Fundamental valuation, keystats ratios, financial reports, intrinsic value, and margin-of-safety analysis.

entries.name: Sentiment Analyst
entries.description: News catalysts, macro sentiment, corporate actions, and insider flow to detect shakeouts or FOMO traps.

entries.name: Market Scanner
entries.description: Market-wide screening, live index draggers, foreign flow movers, and screener templates for IDX.
